Fields

Offsets

An array of offsets generators for SF2 NRPN support. A value of 0 means no change; -10 means 10 lower, etc.

public readonly short[] Offsets

Field Value

short[]

OffsetsEnabled

A small optimization that disables applying offsets until at least one is set.

public bool OffsetsEnabled

Field Value

bool

Overrides

An array of overrides generators for AWE32 NRPN support. A value of GENERATOR_OVERRIDE_NO_CHANGE_VALUE (-32,767) means no change; other values replace current generators.

public readonly short[] Overrides

Field Value

short[]

OverridesEnabled

A small optimization that disables applying overrides until at least one is set.

public bool OverridesEnabled

Field Value

bool
